item.title: Imperialism has as strong propaganda as the empire and as the empire falls , it’s propaganda gets more nonsensical
item.description:
Imperialism has as strong propaganda as the empire and as the empire falls , it’s propaganda gets more nonsensical

item.title: It was not a cult of personality and it will continue after the particularly strong personality of the martyred ayatollah
item.description:
